markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on candidate screening process and communication for a high-volume hiring initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - Focus on top 20% candidates: strong profiles, reasonable salary expectations (\<$100k/yr)
  - [Streamline screening: flag unrealistic salaries, use AI for initial sorting, add custom tags](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Update candidate communication: new email template with clear process overview](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Implement video response limits (7 min/question) and explore AI transcription for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Screening Criteria

  - [Prioritize extremely strong profiles with reasonable salary expectations](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Flag high potential candidates with unrealistic salaries (e.g., $300k for PM role)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Consider company/industry relevance (e.g., consulting, AI, tech)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Use AI-generated stars/thumbs up as initial filter](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Add custom tags for easier filtering (e.g., "flex", location, industry)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### High-Quality Candidate Examples

  - [Former Chief of Staff to SVP at Fortune 100 company](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Candidates showing initiative: personalized outreach, 30-60-90 day plans](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Relevant experience: marketing context, startup experience, tech industry](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Process Optimization

  - [Aim to extend offer before Dec 24th, target start date Jan 6th or 13th](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Reduce review time: focus on batches of \~20 strong candidates](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Implement 7-minute limit per video question response](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Explore AI transcription for video responses to prioritize viewing](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

### Communication Updates

  - [New email template: clear process overview, timeline, and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Address common questions upfront (e.g., interview stages, assessment details)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Emphasize conversational tone and openness to questions](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Applicant Tracking System (ATS) Improvements

  - [Add clear instructions for PDF resume uploads (avoid DOCX files)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Explore options for re-running AI analysis on older applications](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Implement custom tagging system for efficient filtering](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to review incoming applications, checking salary expectations and profiles](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Update email templates in the ATS with new messaging](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Marcel to send LinkedIn message copy to Molly for template modification](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Explore implementation of video transcription API for incoming video responses](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Develop framework for evaluating good video responses (general and role-specific)](https://fathom.video/share/7cRxP1xpCsyiJj1JrCgdjxyQmyDZbbVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
